text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of Yaeno Muteki's debut race. I find
myself awake early and decide to go on a walk to
ease my nerves.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
choice_data_list: I thought I recognized your voice.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
choice_data_list: You're practicing your katas so early today.
You're practicing your katas so early today.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Today is the day of my all-important debut,
so I'm taking more care than usual to temper my
fiery emotions.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I intend to contain these flames within until the
decisive moment, whereupon I shall unleash them
in full force.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I was reviewing my race strategy while practicing
the Yaegaki katas.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I was worried she might be too fired up for her race, but it seems my worries were misplaced. She has her competitive spirit in check for now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki, from deep concentration,
suddenly breaks the silence.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The days where I must engage many opponents in
battle draw near... The mere thought sets my
blood on fire.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Fear not. I have a firm hold on both our race
strategy and how to handle the blaze fierce with
the stillness of water.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I intend to pour my whole being into exemplifying
my school's technique in my debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's every word swells with eagerness,
but she seems perfectly composed and in control
of her competitive drive.
